calendar.matters:
Objection To Ex Parte Petition For Transfer Of Lodged Original Will To Sacramento County Superior Court
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Denied

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Continued To Jan-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Judson appeared by telephone for John Linder.
Michael Mazzacone specially appearing for Susana Cohen on behalf of Edward Winger (Creditor).

The Court noted that there is a prior Sacramento proceeding, that there is a matter here in San Francisco which now has an objection and that the objector alleges that the Decedent was domiciled in Sacramento. Mr. Judson stated that he spoke with Ms. Cohen, and that the only reason the date was continued in the Sacramento matter was to make sure this petition went through and then they would dismiss the Sacramento matter. Mr. Mazzacone stated that he agrees, but if this matter does not go through, he wants to have a party in the Sacramento case. Mr. Judson stated that he looked at the tax records and the death certificate, and that he has made the determination that San Francisco is the proper venue. The Court noted that the objection is not technically late and therefore, it does not know what the merits will be. Mr. Mazzacone stated that the Sacramento hearing is continued to January 18th. Mr. Judson stated that he will file a response within two weeks by December 5th, that he spoke with the objector at length and that he was surprised to hear that an objection was filed. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to January 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court hopes that everything that is going to be filed with regard to venue will be filed by then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Continued To Nov-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
